description: This email template is designed to help startups and lifestyle brands gauge customer satisfaction and loyalty. It's a quick and easy way to reach out to your customers, asking them to spare a moment of their time to provide valuable feedback. The template is perfect for conducting surveys to calculate your net promoter score (NPS), a key metric in understanding your customers' experience and loyalty. It fits perfectly within the News, Blog & Magazines and Survey sectors, as well as the Get To Know Your Customer sector, providing an effective tactic for businesses to connect with their audience, gain insights, and improve their customer service.
short_description: Elevate customer service with this engaging email template designed for gauging satisfaction and loyalty. Ideal for lifestyle brands, startups, and businesses aiming to understand their customers better. Utilize Net Promoter Score (NPS) to measure client advocacy. Perfect for distributing surveys or sharing news and blog content, while enhancing customer relationships.

designer.description:
Graphic Design is at the heart of my story, but I’ve been known to write myself a new part now and again… happily and frequently embracing such roles as: Project Manager, Strategic Thinker, Visual Communicator, Copy Writer, Brand Stylist and Content Curator... magician.

Design is where my passion and my purpose intersect, and providing clients with “the goods” to help their businesses soar is a pretty amazing thing to hop outta’ bed and do each day!

html_data:
We swear, it's quick (& painless)!

Based on your most recent experience with us, we've just go to know: would you recommend us to your BFFs?

How likely are you to recommend our brand to a friend or colleague?

 

□ 0.  Not at all likely

 

□ 1.  Completely dissatisfied

 

□ 2.  Mostly dissatisfied

 

□ 3.  Somewhat dissatisfied

 

□ 4.  Neither satisfied or dissatisfied

 

□ 5.  Neutral schmeutral

 

□ 6.  Somewhat satisfied

 

□ 7.  Mostly satisfied

 

□ 8.  Satisfied

 

□ 9.  Extremely likely

 

□ 10.  WOW-za! telling all my friends!

 

 I'm grateful for your precious time and priceless feedback!

– Georgia Preston |  Founder

 

+123-456-098-771
hello@mail.com
